mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, access_key AS accessKey, daily_limit AS dailyLimit, qps_limit AS qpsLimit, expire_at AS expireAt, remark, status FROM open_api_client
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, name, access_key AS accessKey, daily_limit AS dailyLimit, qps_limit AS qpsLimit, expire_at AS expireAt, remark, status FROM open_api_client WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT ip_addr FROM open_api_client_ip WHERE client_id = #{clientId} ORDER BY ip_addr
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM open_api_client_endpoint WHERE endpoint_id = #{endpointId}
